document_info.prepared_by: David Reinhardt (Producer); Margaret Sullivan (Applicant, VP of Risk Management)

business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors

coverages_discussed.notes: 2024 policy year; 10 claims reported; no cancellations; premium figure approximate due to document image quality
2023 policy year; 13 claims reported; no cancellations; premium figure approximate due to document image quality
2022 policy year; 12 claims reported; no cancellations; premium figure approximate due to document image quality

positives: Formal written safety program in place
GPS tracking and ELD devices installed in all vehicles
MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually
CDL licenses verified for all drivers at time of hire
Valid DOT number and MC authority maintained
Hired auto and non-owned auto exposure is covered
38 years in business; 25 years under current management team
No prior insurance cancellations reported across entire 3-year history
Drivers stated to be in compliance with FMCSA Hours-of-Service regulations
No DOT violations or out-of-service orders in the past 3 years reported
concerns: No written contracts maintained with all subcontractors — significant liability exposure gap for a trucking operation
CSA BASIC Crash Indicator score above intervention threshold — noted as currently being addressed but unresolved at time of submission
CSA BASIC Vehicle Maintenance score within 10% of intervention threshold — borderline compliance
Applicant signature section contains handwritten date '6/18/2025' inconsistent with printed document date of 03/15/2026 — suggests possible pre-signed signature page or backdating anomaly
Producer printed name ('David Reinhardt') does not match the signature on the producer line ('M. Johnson') — material signature discrepancy
Underwriter annotation 'Need docs' on prior insurance history section — supporting loss run documentation is outstanding
Carrier changed every single year across all three prior policy years (Hanover 2024, Hartford 2023, Auto-Owners 2022) — pattern may indicate adverse loss experience, declination, or non-renewal
35 total claims across 3 prior policy years represents elevated claim frequency for the fleet
Sleeper-cab tractors used for long-haul operations — elevated fatigue and liability exposure
Refrigerated reefer units carrying perishable freight — specialized cargo liability and spoilage exposure
Flatbed operations hauling steel, lumber, and machinery — elevated load securement and cargo liability risk
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Three-year prior insurance history reported: 2024 (Hanover Insurance Group) — 10 claims; 2023 (Hartford Financial Services) — 13 claims; 2022 (Auto-Owners Insurance) — 12 claims. Total of 35 claims across three policy years with no cancellations reported. Insured changed carriers each year. Supporting loss run documentation has been flagged as outstanding per underwriter annotation. Annual premiums ranged from approximately $2.01M to $2.07M.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. Operates Monday through Friday 6:00 AM to 4:30 PM. 485 full-time and 52 part-time employees (537 total). Annual revenue $78,000,000. 38 years in business; 25 years under current management. Operates 9 locations across Ohio and Pennsylvania including 7 warehouses (LOC-001 through LOC-007), 1 service/repair facility (LOC-008), and 1 office (LOC-009), totaling approximately 735,000 sq ft of space. All locations sprinklered. Primary commodities hauled: dry van — general freight and packaged goods; flatbed — steel, lumber, and machinery. Sleeper-cab tractors used for long-haul operations. Refrigerated reefer units carrying perishable freight also operated. ICC operating authority: Interstate (FMCSA) only. Policy number on file: WC GLFS 2025 8820, effective 06/01/2025.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. GPS tracking and ELD devices installed in all vehicles. MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually. CDL licenses verified at time of hire. Drivers stated to be in compliance with FMCSA Hours-of-Service (HOS) regulations. CSA BASIC Vehicle Maintenance score is within 10% of the intervention threshold. CSA BASIC Crash Indicator score is above the intervention threshold and is currently being addressed. No DOT violations or out-of-service orders reported in the past 3 years. Valid DOT number and MC authority maintained.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Three years of prior insurance history provided with three different carriers. 2024 (Hanover Insurance Group): 10 claims, no cancellations. 2023 (Hartford Financial Services): 13 claims, no cancellations. 2022 (Auto-Owners Insurance): 12 claims, no cancellations. Total of 35 claims reported across the three-year window. Carrier changed in each successive policy year. Underwriter has annotated the prior insurance history section with 'Need docs,' indicating that supporting loss run documentation has not yet been received.
